title: encephalocarpus strobiliformis
intro: Encephalocarpus strobiliformis, also known as the 'brain fruit', is a type of plant with a unique fruit that resembles a brain. The plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its various medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation and improve digestion. The health benefits of Encephalocarpus strobiliformis include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce anxiety, and improve cognitive function. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as being dried and used in capsule or powder form for its medicinal properties.
